name: Vegan Cream
intro: I always have a box full of vegan cream in my refrigerator. This cream can be used the same way real dairy cream is used. Eat it with fruit or add a dollop to breakfast porridge, or use it to make dal makhani and other full-bodied Indian gravies.
method: In a bowl, soak cashew nuts for 5 hours.
Drain and transfer the nuts into a blender.
Add just enough water to the blender to allow the nuts to turn. Blend at high speed.
Once the mixture becomes creamy, blend it for 30 seconds.
Store the cream in a jar for up to 2 days in the refrigerator.
